title: Sellers With No Sales
description: Find sellers who had no sales in year 2020.
constraints: seller_id is the primary key of Seller
order_id is the primary key of Orders
A seller may have zero orders
sale_date is a DATE column — use YEAR() or date range filter
Result must be ordered by seller_name ascending
key_concept: LEFT JOIN with date filter IN JOIN condition (not WHERE) to preserve NULL rows for no-match detection.

hints.L1: LEFT JOIN Orders on seller_id where order_date is in 2020. WHERE order_id IS NULL means no 2020 sales.
hints.L2: Put the year filter in the JOIN condition, NOT the WHERE clause — otherwise NULL rows get filtered out.
hints.L3: SELECT s.seller_name FROM Seller s LEFT JOIN Orders o ON s.seller_id = o.seller_id AND YEAR(o.sale_date) = 2020 WHERE o.order_id IS NULL ORDER BY s.seller_name

optimal_solution:
SELECT s.seller_name FROM Seller s
LEFT JOIN Orders o ON s.seller_id = o.seller_id AND YEAR(o.sale_date) = 2020
WHERE o.order_id IS NULL
ORDER BY s.seller_name;
